title: TypeException when a function does not exist.
poc: CREATE TABLE t1 (ra float NOT NULL, "dec" float NOT NULL);
select fDistanceArcMinEq(213.7849600 , -0.4932472, ra,"dec") as distance_arcmin from t1, fGetNearbyObjAllEq(213.7849600 , -0.4932472 , 20.8897421 ) as N;
CREATE FUNCTION f1() RETURNS float BEGIN DECLARE nx1 float; END;
key_bug_features: Calling a non-existent function causes TypeException
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (ra FLOAT NOT NULL, "dec" FLOAT NOT NULL);
CREATE FUNCTION f1() RETURNS FLOAT BEGIN DECLARE nx1 FLOAT; END;
